images.revised_prompt:
Create a 1:1 square ecommerce SKU color chart image for women's high-waist seamless workout shorts, using the attached product reference images as the source for the exact garment shape, construction, texture, and stitch details. Show the same shorts as a standalone product (no model) in a clean 3x3 grid with no visible grid lines, balanced spacing, consistent angle and scale. Use the rear view angle matching the reference product: high ribbed waistband, seamless ribbed fabric texture, scrunch/glute contour seam at back, curved rear yoke seam, short leg length, stitched leg hems and edges, plain solid fabric.

Nine verified color options only, one per tile, ordered left to right/top to bottom: Black, Blue, Orange, Pink, Dark Green, Dark Pink, Brown, Green, Gray. Add a small English color label centered under each product in modern clean typography. All labels in English only.

Visual style: professional high-converting Amazon-style ecommerce SKU chart, clean premium white/light neutral background, attractive soft studio lighting, polished commercial poster design, strong visual hierarchy, beautiful product presentation.

Strict no-marks rule: do not add sparkle, shine icons, decorative symbols, logos, brand marks, watermarks, patterns, badges, stickers, extra graphics, QR codes, manufacturer/supplier/platform marks, contact info, website URLs, or price info. Shorts must be plain solid-color fabric with only real seams and ribbed texture. Do not invent unsupported colors or designs. Keep product details 100% identical across all colors except color.
